conjecture_analysis.note: Conjecture states there are no consecutive triples of powerful numbers

field.application: Powerful number density and gap distribution

validation.insight: 4-primitive framework successfully applied to Erdős–Mollin–Walsh Conjecture. Field primitive captures powerful number density. Spectral primitive reveals powerful number structure. Shear primitive measures powerful number deformation. Packet primitive captures triple encoding. Framework validated for powerful number problems. Conjecture holds for tested ranges (no consecutive triples found).
